message.content:
I don’t have live weather data in this turn, so I can’t pull Indianapolis’s current conditions right now. Here’s a concise Telegram-style update template you can send, and I’ll fill it in with exact numbers if you want me to fetch them in a subsequent turn.

Telegram update (example format)

Indianapolis, IN: 72°F, Partly cloudy, light breeze; chance of rain 10% today; wind 5 mph from the SW.

If you’d like, I can pull the latest current conditions and convert them into a ready-to-send message as soon as I have tool access. Would you like me to proceed with a live lookup and provide the exact temperature, sky condition, and rain/wind risk for today?
